project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-108 - MFC
comment: Departed Aksai at 12:30hrs KT on Thursday 21st and arrived at Tengiz at 13:45 hrs KT on 22nd May. Equipment and logging truck has arrived outside the field too. Weather windy and exceeding working limit for the crane at the wellsite. Liaising with the wellsite supervisor regarding taking the trucks with equipment and the logging truck onto the well site.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
PRJ02722 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9886 - SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Job is now scheduled for the 26th May.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment:
SLB drifted to 7494ft with 4.35 FlexiDrift and 8986 Ft with 3” FlexiDrift
Aim to Rig up MFC around 8:30am

project: PRJ03251 - Baker Hughes - Baker Hughes Qatar - NFR2-2_NFR2-5A - MFC
comment: Baker have been informed by QE that they will need to wait for Slickline (Wellsanam) to finish on WHP2. This will delay mobilisation until the start of June. GP to travel home tonight.
